metadata.name: sallu-bhai
metadata.summary: The library for converting your boring innnocous natural language into CLI commands.

classes.name: sallu-bhai.core.NL2CLI

methods.name: sallu-bhai.core.NL2CLI.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the library with a model.
If `-n` is passed, it selects an available model dynamically.

```
param model

The name of the LLM model hosted on Ollama.
If None, defaults to the first available model.
```

methods.name: sallu-bhai.core.NL2CLI.get_available_model
documentation:
Fetches available models using `ollama list` and returns the first available one.

```
return

The name of the first available model.

raises

RuntimeError if no models are available.
```

methods.name: sallu-bhai.core.NL2CLI.set_model
documentation:
Update the model used by the library.

```
param model_name

The new model name to use.
```

methods.name: sallu-bhai.core.NL2CLI.get_cli_command
documentation:
Sends the natural language description to the LLM and retrieves the corresponding CLI command.

```
param natural_language

The natural language input.

return

The cleaned CLI command as a string.

raises

RuntimeError if the API call fails or the response format is unexpected.
```
A library for converting natural language to CLI commands using Ollama's chat functionality.
